params.prompt: fine pixel art, 16-bit hi-bit style, point-and-click adventure game background, in the style of classic SCUMM adventures, painterly dithering, muted palette, moody theatrical night lighting, flat side-on view like a theater stage set, building facades parallel to the picture plane, street running level across the bottom edge, seen straight-on from across the street, empty scene, no people, no animals, no text, no watermark.
